feed.title: Stalin S (w4nn4d13)
feed.subtitle: Official blog of Stalin S (w4nn4d13). Focused on cybersecurity, penetration testing, and AI-driven security research.

entry.title: CVE-2026-29905 - Kirby CMS Persistent DoS via Malformed Image Upload

link.title: CVE-2026-29905 - Kirby CMS Persistent DoS via Malformed Image Upload

entry.summary: CVE-2026-29905 - Kirby CMS Persistent DoS via Malformed Image Upload CVE-2026-29905 has been officially published by MITRE. Overview An authenticated user with Editor permissions can upload a malformed file with an image extension to cause a persistent Denial of Service in Kirby CMS. CVE ID: CVE-2026-29905 Affected Version: Kirby CMS <= 5.1.4 Fixed In: Kirby CMS 5.2.0-rc.1 S...
